description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in dark, glossy leather with deep button tufting across the seat, backrest, and armrests, giving it a classic Chesterfield appearance. The armrests are high and rolled, matching the height of the backrest and curving outward slightly, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The seat and back cushions are integrated and feature uniform, deep tufting, contributing to a plush, luxurious look. The sofa's base is solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy and grounded design. The overall silhouette is rounded and inviting, with a continuous, uninterrupted back and arm profile. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish waiting areas, or chic outdoor patios.
description: A dark, glossy leather Chesterfield-style sofa with deep button tufting, high rolled armrests, and a rounded, fully upholstered base. Its plush, classic design exudes luxury and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep button-tufted seat and backrest, high rolled armrests, and the inviting, plush seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded profile of the armrest and backrest, as well as the continuous tufting and absence of visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, curved back with uniform tufting and the solid, fully upholstered base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest's rolled shape and the sofa's overall rounded silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated seat and back cushions with deep, uniform button tufting; all cushions are attached and evenly distributed across the seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: High, rolled armrests that are continuous with the backrest, fully upholstered in leather, and padded for comfort; armrests are at the same height as the backrest and feature deep tufting.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded structure.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a rounded shape and deep button tufting; the backrest is integrated with the armrests and features attached cushioning.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark leather with a glossy finish and deep button tufting throughout the seat, backrest, and armrests, creating a classic, textured pattern.
